mapper.sql: p.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, p.PLATFORM AS platform, p.PLATFORM_PRODUCT_ID AS platformProductId, p.PRODUCT_KEY AS productKey, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND AS brand, p.CATEGORY AS category, p.PRICE AS price, p.AVG_RATING AS avgRating, p.TOTAL_REVIEW_COUNT AS totalReviewCount, p.CAUTION_LEVEL AS cautionLevel, p.RECOMMENDATION_SCORE AS recommendationScore, p.RECOMMENDATION_TIER AS recommendationTier, p.EVIDENCE_LEVEL AS evidenceLevel, p.PRODUCT_URL AS productUrl, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, p.IMAGE_STATUS AS imageStatus, NVL(f.IS_VISIBLE, 'Y') AS isVisible, NVL(f.EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION, 'N') AS excludeRecommendation, NVL(f.IS_FEATURED, 'N') AS isFeatured, NVL(f.QUALITY_STATUS, 'NORMAL') AS qualityStatus, f.HIDE_REASON AS hideReason, f.ADMIN_MEMO AS adminMemo, f.UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy, TO_CHAR(f.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_FAVORITES fav WHERE fav.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingCount, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(rt.RATING), 2) FROM BL_PRODUCT_RATINGS rt WHERE rt.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID) AS siteRatingAvg, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_USER_PRODUCT_EVENTS ev WHERE ev.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND ev.EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'DETAIL_VIEW')) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BL_PRODUCT_COMMENTS c WHERE c.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND c.STATUS = 'ACTIVE') AS commentCount
mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS productId, IS_VISIBLE AS isVisible, EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION AS excludeRecommendation, IS_FEATURED AS isFeatured, QUALITY_STATUS AS qualityStatus, HIDE_REASON AS hideReason, ADMIN_MEMO AS adminMemo, UPDATED_BY AS updatedBy, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS f USING (SELECT #{productId} AS PRODUCT_ID FROM DUAL) src ON (f.PRODUCT_ID = src.PRODUCT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET f.IS_VISIBLE = #{isVisible,jdbcType=CHAR}, f.EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION = #{excludeRecommendation,jdbcType=CHAR}, f.IS_FEATURED = #{isFeatured,jdbcType=CHAR}, f.QUALITY_STATUS = #{qualityStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, f.HIDE_REASON = #{hideReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, f.ADMIN_MEMO = #{adminMemo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, f.UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, f.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRODUCT_ID, IS_VISIBLE, EXCLUDE_RECOMMENDATION, IS_FEATURED, QUALITY_STATUS, HIDE_REASON, ADMIN_MEMO, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{isVisible,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{excludeRecommendation,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isFeatured,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{qualityStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hideReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminMemo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE)

UPDATE BL_PRODUCT_ADMIN_FLAGS SET ${field} = #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HIDE_REASON = CASE WHEN #{field} = 'IS_VISIBLE' AND #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR} = 'N' THEN #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ELSE HIDE_REASON END, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
